description: I am sorry, sir, I could not give Edgelord his clean 1:1 — there were five Drilbur and Excadrill prints across four sets and only a lone wave-27 mirror between two of them, so anything I drew would have been duplicate edges pointing at a missing center. I have proposed the drilbur-line character node instead, the same shape as larvitar-line and staraptor-line, and pointed all five cards at it. I do hope it helps; the grid even names Drilbur-Excadrill in the Earth Rat Deep Four cell, so the node will earn its keep when a zodiac Lair gets built.
citations: [diamondlegendz/pokemon-zodiac app.js DATA grid: Earth Rat cell — 'Drilbur-Excadrill (mole, Ground/Steel — borderline rodent)']

node_proposed.corpus_coverage: 5 prints across 2 of 2 line members (full-line) and 4 sets
node_proposed.threshold_basis: 3+ corpus prints across 2+ stages — same threshold larvitar-line sits at

other_candidates_considered: A zodiac-cohort node for the Swords of Justice quartet (Cobalion / Terrakion / Virizion / Keldeo): grid-canonical, spans four cells across three rows, but corpus holds only Terrakion VIV-092 — far below threshold. Refused; staged for a future wave when 2+ quartet members are in corpus.

Extending elemental-monkey-trio with Black Bolt Simisage BB-005: that card is pre-enrichment (no vision, no trivia) per the trio node's own caveat — not Edgelord-eligible. Staged for after BB-005 receives vision and trivia.
A plain 1:1 mirror between two of the orphaned Drilbur/Excadrill prints: rejected as the spec's named anti-pattern (duplicate edges pointing at an absent center). The node is the correct move.

Enlightened dissolution of the wave-27 Drilbur CEC-114 -> Excadrill FUS-183 mirror, now subsumed by this node: a valid future single-operation decision, staged in the node's caveats. Not executed this wave — one operation per invocation.
next_pass_suggestions: When Black Bolt Simisage BB-005 is vision+trivia passed, cohort-attach it to elemental-monkey-trio (the trio node already names it as the remaining in-set candidate).
An enlightened-Edgelord pass may dissolve the now-subsumed wave-27 Drilbur CEC-114 <-> Excadrill FUS-183 1:1 mirror and replace it with a stronger cross-node edge.
Swords of Justice zodiac-cohort node becomes viable when a second quartet member (Cobalion / Virizion / Keldeo) enters corpus alongside Terrakion VIV-092.
